details.test: Task 1: Book 60-min career change video coaching session next week
Task 2: Enroll in stress management course under 3 hours & add to Current Month Plan
Task 3: Create weekly self-care plan with 5 activities totaling 150-200 minutes
Task 4: Complete mood assessment and create 14-day mood tracking goal
Task 5: Build March Growth Reading list with saved anxiety & self-confidence articles
Task 6: Join burnout support group and RSVP to next meeting
Task 7: Create and favorite Daily Calm playlist with 3 beginner tracks
Task 8: Choose cheaper 45-min video coach (rating 4.5+) and send intro message
Task 9: Customize 30-day emotional resilience challenge with gratitude and rest days
